description: A slot swap carries the wrong connection string into production because settings were not marked slot-sticky.
body: Failure mode: deployment slots are used but the staging connection string or environment flag is not marked as a slot setting, so on swap the staging value follows into production. Detection signals: production points at a staging database or feature flag after a swap, config diff shows the setting moved, and the swap completed without warm-up. Do not assume all settings stay with their slot. Safer fallback: mark environment-specific settings as slot settings (deployment slot setting), warm up the staging slot before swapping, verify health post-swap, and keep swap-back ready as rollback.
